title: 4 Stocks to Watch as Bitcoin Looks Poised for a 2024 Rally
text: Stocks like Coinbase Global, Inc. (COIN), Block Inc. (SQ), NVIDIA Corporation (NVDA) and Interactive Brokers Group, Inc. (IBKR) are likely to gain from the ongoing Bitcoin rally.

title: 20 midcap stocks with 2024 upside ranging up to 62%, according to analysts
text: When investors think about whether to increase their exposure beyond the big companies that grab most of the headlines in the financial media, they are likely to look at small-cap stocks first. After all, the sky's the limit.

title: Interactive Brokers Group to Host Fourth Quarter Earnings Conference Call
text: GREENWICH, Conn.--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $IBKR #Earnings--Interactive Brokers Group, Inc. (Nasdaq: IBKR) plans to announce its fourth quarter financial results on Tuesday, January 16, 2024, in a release that will be issued at approximately 4:00 pm (ET). The press release will also be available on the company's website, www.interactivebrokers.com/ir. A conference call to discuss the company's results will be held at 4:30 pm (ET) on that day, January 16. Members of the public who would like to listen to the conference.

title: Bitcoin to Shine in 2024: Are These 5 Stocks on Your Radar?
text: Stocks like NVIDIA Corporation (NVDA), Coinbase Global (COIN), Block (SQ), Interactive Brokers Group (IBKR) and PayPal Holdings (PYPL) are likely to benefit in the near term form the Bitcoin rally.

title: 3 Stocks to Watch as Bitcoin Remains Above the $40k Mark
text: Cboe Global (CBOE), Interactive Brokers (IBKR) and NVIDIA (NVDA) are three stocks that can be tracked as the price of Bitcoin continues to hover above the $40,000 mark.

title: The Next Bitcoin Halving Is Coming! 3 Crypto Stocks to Reap the Most Rewards.
text: If history is any guide, the crypto market is poised for a major rally in the months leading up to the next Bitcoin ( BTC-USD ) halving event. As we approach the new year, speculators could push up the prices of cryptocurrencies, benefiting traditional stocks with crypto exposure.

title: 5 Crypto-Centric Stocks to Buy to Tap the Rally
text: We have narrowed our search to five crypto-centric stocks with strong potential for the rest of 2023. These are: NVDA, SQ, COIN, IBKR, HUT.

title: Interactive Brokers (IBKR) Records Decline in November DARTs
text: Interactive Brokers (IBKR) records a 2% sequential and 3% y/y decline in client DARTs in November 2023.

title: Interactive Brokers Group Reports Brokerage Metrics and Other Financial Information for November 2023, includes Reg.-NMS Execution Statistics
text: GREENWICH, Conn.--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $IBKR #IBKR--Interactive Brokers Group, Inc. (Nasdaq: IBKR) an automated global electronic broker, today reported its Electronic Brokerage monthly performance metrics for November. Brokerage highlights for the month included: 1.898 million Daily Average Revenue Trades (DARTs)1, 3% lower than prior year and 2% lower than prior month. Ending client equity of $404.3 billion, 27% higher than prior year and 10% higher than prior month. Ending client margin loan balances of $42.
